content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

November 8, 2000

Bruce Thompson
Assemblyman, 66th District
State Capitol
Post Office Box 942849
Sacramento, CA 94249-0066

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W–00-244

Dear Assemblyman Thompson:

This letter confirms the telephone message left by a member of your staff, Mr. Back, indicating your desire to withdraw your request for advice.

Enclosed, please find a copy of our Commission's fact sheet summarizing the rules governing post-government employment. Please do not hesitate to contact me if you have further questions about your responsibilities under the Act.

Sincerely,

C. Scott Tocher
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

CST:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\00244.doc
